description: This file contains mixins for rendering caret icons in different directions, used for styling UI components with CSS.

methods.name: caret-down
methods.description: Mixin to style a downward pointing caret with specified width.

methods.name: caret-up
methods.description: Mixin to style an upward pointing caret with specified width.

methods.name: caret-end
methods.description: Mixin to style a caret pointing to the end (right) with specified width.

methods.name: caret-start
methods.description: Mixin to style a caret pointing to the start (left) with specified width.

methods.name: caret
methods.description: Main mixin to generate a caret with configurable direction, width, spacing, and vertical alignment.
